name: Ashtari Yoga & Retreat
description: Welcome to Ashtari Yoga in Kuta Lombok! Daily yoga classes, retreats, teacher trainings and private holistic services in a beautiful hillside sanctuary with sea views.
profileLead: A hillside sanctuary above Kuta Lombok offering daily yoga classes, retreats, holistic services, events and immersive teacher trainings with panoramic sea views.
overview: Ashtari describes itself as a sanctuary for yoga, wellness and inner discovery in the hills above Kuta. The official site highlights daily classes, retreat packages, private holistic services, upcoming events and a 200-hour teacher training.
about: Welcome to Ashtari Yoga in Kuta Lombok, your sanctuary for yoga, wellness and inner discovery. The venue sits among green hills with wide views of the sea, and the experience combines movement, mindfulness, nourishment and community in one elevated setting.
practicesIntro: Ashtari combines movement, healing and retreat-style experiences in one location.
location: Ashtari Estate, Road to Mawun, Desa Prabu, 83355 Kuta, South Lombok, Indonesia

highlights.title: Daily practice
highlights.text: The official site highlights daily classes ranging from energizing vinyasa to restorative yin, with sessions designed for different levels.

name: Mana Yoga Retreat
description: Mana Retreat Lombok is located in Kuta, Lombok. We have yoga classes every day, a cinema, spa, restaurant and an incredible array of places to stay.
profileLead: A peaceful boutique retreat in the heart of Kuta Lombok with daily yoga, trainings, retreats, spa treatments, healthy food and beautifully designed accommodation.
overview: Mana Retreat Lombok presents itself as a peaceful getaway in Kuta with yoga classes every day, accommodation, a spa, restaurant, cinema and an active retreat and teacher-training calendar.
about: Mana is designed as a calm little oasis in the heart of Kuta Lombok. The official site combines accommodation with a yoga-and-retreat identity, while guest reviews repeatedly describe it as peaceful, beautiful and close enough to town while still feeling tucked away.
practicesIntro: Mana blends studio practice, retreat life and boutique hospitality in one place.

highlights.title: Daily movement

name: Cocoon Healing Lombok
description: A small sanctuary on a hill of the beautiful island of Lombok. Our peaceful retreat venue offers everything you need for relaxation, healing and growth.
profileLead: A small healing sanctuary on a hill east of Kuta Lombok offering retreat space, accommodation, energy work and wellness treatments in a calm natural setting.
overview: Cocoon Healing Hut presents itself as a peaceful sanctuary on a hill near Kuta Lombok for hosting retreats, booking wellness stays and exploring treatments and energy work such as Reiki and sound healing.
about: Cocoon Healing Hut describes itself as a small sanctuary on a hill in Lombok, designed for people who want to slow down, reconnect and support well-being in body, mind and soul. The site says it is about ten minutes by scooter east of Kuta, with views over rice fields, villages and the sea.
practicesIntro: Cocoon focuses on a softer, restorative mix of stays, treatments and energy work.
location: Jalan Kener, Desa Sukadana Kuta NTB, Lombok 83573, Indonesia

highlights.title: Retreat-ready setting

name: Shanti Yoga Lombok
description: Welcome to Shanti Yoga Lombok at Jivana Resort. We provide yoga classes, private sessions, retreats, sound healing and cacao ceremonies in a lush tropical setting.
profileLead: A serene studio at Jivana Resort where daily yoga, private sessions and regular moon gatherings come together in a tropical Kuta Lombok setting.
overview: Shanti Yoga Lombok welcomes beginners to advanced students with yoga classes, private sessions, retreats, sound healing and cacao ceremonies in a calm resort environment.
about: Located at Jivana Resort in Kuta Mandalika, Shanti Yoga Lombok combines daily classes with regular holistic events in a peaceful tropical setting. The studio positions itself as an accessible space for beginners, intermediate students and advanced practitioners alike.
practicesIntro: A gentle mix of movement, ceremony and restorative wellness experiences.
location: Shanti Yoga Lombok, Jivana Resort area, Jl. Raya Kuta Baturiti, Kuta Mandalika, Lombok, Indonesia

name: Ikara Yoga
description: IKARA Yoga is the first and only Traditional Ashtanga Yoga studio & retreat in Lombok, a paradise-like island in Indonesia.
profileLead: A dedicated Ashtanga-focused studio in Lombok offering traditional practice, immersive retreats and deeper intensive study.
overview: Ikara describes itself as Lombok’s traditional Ashtanga yoga studio and retreat space, with retreats and intensives for students seeking a more structured practice path.
about: Ikara Yoga focuses on the traditional Ashtanga method and presents itself as the first dedicated Traditional Ashtanga yoga studio and retreat in Lombok. Alongside regular practice, it also offers retreats and themed intensives for students wanting to go deeper.
practicesIntro: A clean and focused offering built around traditional yoga practice.
location: Ikara Yoga, Kuta Lombok, Lombok, Indonesia

description: Kuara Lombok is a boutique beachfront resort offering ocean-view villas, private pools and authentic island experiences with wellness and spa.

name: Flowers & Fire
description: Our yoga classes at Flowers & Fire cater to a variety of styles and levels – from first-timers to experienced yogis – in our beautiful garden and seaside locations.
profileLead: A soulful island yoga space with both a garden studio and a seaside location, offering classes for first-timers through experienced yogis.
overview: Flowers & Fire offers yoga in both a treehouse garden studio and a beachfront setting on Gili Air, with classes, workshops and a distinctly soulful island feel.
about: Flowers & Fire runs yoga classes across two distinct island settings on Gili Air: a treehouse-style yoga garden and a seaside location. The approach is open and accessible, with an emphasis on soulful practice, breath and ease rather than performance.
practicesIntro: A yoga profile with more atmosphere, softness and island character.
location: Flowers & Fire Yoga Garden and Seaside Yoga, Gili Air, Lombok, Indonesia
